mapper.sql: s.id, s.student_no, s.id_card_type, s.ethnicity, s.political_status, s.user_id, COALESCE(u.username, s.student_no) as username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.gender, u.identity_card, u.birth_date, s.class_id, c.class_name, s.grade_id, g.grade_name, COALESCE(g.grade_level, c.grade_level) as grade_level, s.major_id, m.major_name, s.education_level, s.study_length, s.degree_type, s.admission_date, s.graduation_date, s.student_status, s.guardian_name, s.guardian_phone, s.guardian_relation, s.father_name, s.father_id_card, s.father_phone, s.mother_name, s.mother_id_card, s.mother_phone, s.guardian_id_card, s.home_address, s.hukou_province, s.hukou_city, s.hukou_district, s.hukou_address, s.hukou_type, s.postal_code, s.is_poverty_registered, s.financial_aid_type, s.dormitory_id, b.building_no as building_no, b.building_name as building_name, d.dormitory_no as room_no, s.bed_number, s.created_at, s.updated_at

FROM students s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN grades g ON s.grade_id = g.id AND g.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.id AND m.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON s.dormitory_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN buildings b ON d.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} AND s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET dormitory_id = NULL, bed_number = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE students s INNER JOIN dormitories d ON s.dormitory_id = d.id SET s.dormitory_id = NULL, s.bed_number = NULL, s.updated_at = NOW() WHERE d.building_id = #{buildingId} AND s.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY s.student_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE s.class_id = #{classId} AND s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_status = 1 AND u.gender = #{gender}
